title: ClassicX
description: ClassicX is a client side Modpack Giving You The Same Like Experience As Vanilla But More Quality of Life Client Side Mods.
body:
ClassicX is a client side Modpack Giving You The Same Experience As Vanilla But More Performance Stability

As Mentioned ClassicX Wants To Give You Most of What **Vanilla** Could Have Been if it was more 
**Optimized**
